title: 1%World
description: Only 1% of the Minecraft World Exists!
body:
# Only 1% of the Minecraft World Exists!

🌍 The 1% World Constraint
Only 1% of the world exists. Forget everything you know—you must reinvent your exploration and resource management strategies. With only essential structures remaining, every item must be scavenged from limited points of interest. Your ultimate goal? Defeat the dragon and conquer what's left of the world!

🏆 Why Play 1% World?
If you are tired of the standard survival loop and looking for a unique "mini-game" style experience, this mod is for you. It turns Minecraft into a strategic puzzle where your creativity is your greatest tool
